description: This section covers two DEL'AR® product categories: complex mixtures for fermented kvass production (simplifies process, reduces need for kvass wort concentrate, shortens fermentation to 12-14 hours) and concentrates/premixes for beverages (containing vitamins, minerals, caffeine, plant extracts for sports, functional, juice, and energy drinks). IMPORTANT: This file should always be selected when premixes are mentioned in the query. Additionally, always select this file for any queries concerning energy or tonic drinks or kvass.

kvass_mixtures.description: This section focuses on DEL'AR® complex mixtures for fermented kvass production, TYPE: Mixture!!!. These specialized solutions are designed to significantly simplify and accelerate the technological process while ensuring compliance with GOST R 53094-2008 standards. The mixtures allow manufacturers to reduce or completely eliminate the use of kvass wort concentrate, exclude the starter preparation stage (including starter cultivation and feeding), and shorten fermentation time to just 12-14 hours. The product range features various flavor profiles including traditional, light, white, and apple kvass varieties, providing ready-made solutions for beverage producers looking to expand their product offerings with minimal technological adjustments.

drink_mixtures.description: This section details DEL'AR® concentrates and premixes for beverage production. This section contains products suitable for GOST R 53094-2008 standards. The assortment includes fruit-berry concentrates such as Raspberry (HRC 13.3 from Manuubi), dry kvass wort concentrate, and functional premixes containing vitamins, minerals, caffeine, and natural plant extracts. The range features specialized options including isotonic premix (mineral), vitamin-mineral premix D (with vitamin D3), vitamin premix AEC (with vitamins A, E, C), premixes for beverages with caffeine, colorants and vitamin complexes, and functional premix AR with natural extracts (guarana, ginseng), taurine, and caffeine. These products streamline production processes by eliminating the need for separate ingredient selection and addition, while ensuring consistent quality and functional properties in sports, functional, juice-containing, and energy drinks.
